title: Website Mod
description: Makes a website for a server.
body:
Features this mod creates.

1. It creates a website on a port(default :8001).

2. The home page gives access to a map page for which can work with dynmap or another map mod.

3. It also creates a about page where you can write all the details about the server for any new player to understand the server. Also accessible from the default homepage.

4. go to your server files after the server bots up. Go to config folder and then open the config file. 

5. If you go to the html folder within the config folder you can edit the about page and map page.

Put this in your mods folder, then run the server. Afterwards set your port in the config file as well as customize your about_us.html with notepad and the map.html file.
